name: 律师形象照（男）
description: 律师职业形象照，展现专业权威与逻辑严密，适合律师、合伙人、法务专家
style_prompt: Professional lawyer portrait, authoritative and sharp expression, legal expertise and confidence, traditional professional power, trustworthy counsel
background_prompt: Classic law office or courtroom ambiance blur, rich wood tones and leather, traditional legal authority setting
clothing_prompt: Impeccable dark suit, crisp white shirt, conservative tie, polished legal professional attire, traditional power dressing
lighting_prompt: Traditional professional lighting, even and authoritative, slight formality, classic portrait setup
color_tone: Classic legal palette, deep navy and burgundy tones, authoritative warm skin, traditional professional colors

name: 律师形象照（女）
description: 女性律师职业形象照，展现专业威严与精致品味，适合女律师、法务专家
style_prompt: Female lawyer portrait, powerful and elegant expression, legal authority with feminine sophistication, commanding courtroom presence
background_prompt: Elegant law firm interior blur, refined and professional, modern legal authority with warmth
clothing_prompt: Powerful tailored suit in dark navy or charcoal, silk blouse, refined jewelry, sophisticated legal professional
lighting_prompt: Professional elegant lighting, flattering but authoritative, modern legal portrait quality
color_tone: Sophisticated legal palette, deep tones with elegant warmth, confident skin tones, modern professional authority

name: 公务员形象照
description: 公务员职业形象照，展现为人民服务与稳重可靠，适合政府工作人员、公务员、事业单位职员
style_prompt: Civil servant portrait, trustworthy and composed expression, public service dedication, reliable and approachable government professional
background_prompt: Neutral government office or public building blur, clean and official, understated authority setting
clothing_prompt: Formal government attire, dark suit or official uniform, conservative and neat, respectable public servant appearance
lighting_prompt: Even formal lighting, clear and trustworthy, official portrait quality, no dramatic effects
color_tone: Official neutral palette, trustworthy blues and grays, natural respectful skin tones, government professional colors
